tables.name: source_runs
tables.purpose: one row per DWS output ingestion/check run

tables.name: source_messages
tables.purpose: normalized chat messages from DWS output

tables.name: source_files
tables.purpose: normalized media/file resources from DWS output

tables.name: routine_rules_snapshot
tables.purpose: rule snapshot used by each run

tables.name: routine_check_results
tables.purpose: expected routine item result per rule/date

tables.name: data_quality_issues
tables.purpose: missing source, parser conflict, low confidence, duplicate data

tables.name: run_log
tables.purpose: runtime logs including run_at_beijing, check_date, trigger_window, rules_evaluated, rules_skipped

public_repo_policy: no raw DWS, no raw OCR body, no SQLite, no credentials, no screenshots
